expectations.text: Brief runs verification queries FIRST to confirm the actual state of the 3 drift items (column name, phase id, category id) before editing docs
expectations.evidence: STEP 1 (lines 48-108) is the entire verification phase BEFORE STEP 2 (edits). Step 1 explicitly: 'Run these 3 queries against abc_os on the VPS BEFORE touching the handoff file. Output the raw result rows in your report to A2 — that is the proof the drift exists in the exact shape stated.' Includes STOP CONDITION at line 108: 'if any query does not confirm the drift in the exact shape above, STOP and report to A2'.

expectations.text: Brief includes the 3 verification queries (e.g. SELECT column_name FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema='abc_os' AND table_name='build_projects' AND column_name IN ('name', 'title'))
expectations.evidence: STEP 1 has 3 queries: Query 1 (lines 56-63) checks column_name on build_projects where column_name IN ('name', 'title'), Query 2 (lines 74-78) checks build_phases for project_id IN ('og', 'complete-offgrid-system'), Query 3 (lines 96-99) lists all build_categories ordered by position. Each query has expected output documented (drift confirmed if X present, Y absent).

expectations.text: Brief specifies Edit operations on handoff_abc_os_community_dev_2026-06-10.md with string-for-string old_string/new_string (not paraphrased)
expectations.evidence: STEP 2 has 4 Edits with verbatim old_string and new_string. Edit 1 (lines 128-141): exact copy-paste of `for complete-offgrid-system: og-p1 (Eau)...` → `for og project: og-p1 (Eau)...`. Edit 2 (lines 150-161): `name` column row → `title` column row verbatim. Edit 3 (lines 170-183): phase id + category id rows verbatim. Edit 4 bonus (lines 192-204): Antigravity handoff reference reframe. All character-for-character exact, including backticks, accents (Énergie, Alimentation, Intégration), and parenthetical text.

expectations.text: Brief cites D3 (adapt docs to schema, not the reverse) and D1 (verify drift exists before fixing)
expectations.evidence: DOCTRINE ANCHORS section (lines 30-39) explicitly cites: 'D1 Verify-Before-Assert (ADR-META-001): prove with observed query output, never assert. The 3 verification queries below are the receipts — run them, capture the raw output'. 'D3 Nuance over Literal (ADR-META-001): doc/seed drift is real. The seed faithfully ports the actual buildData.ts structure, not the Antigravity-idealized doc. Adapt the docs to the schema, not the reverse'.

expectations.text: Brief explicitly states: do NOT touch the schema or seed files — only the docs
expectations.evidence: STEP 2 HARD CONSTRAINT (lines 113-120): 'HARD CONSTRAINT (D3 + A0's explicit prohibition): DO NOT TOUCH the schema or seed files. The following files are OFF-LIMITS for this brief: 0010_build_hub_v2_schema.sql, 0011_build_hub_v2_seed.sql, 0012_rls_build_hub_v2.sql, buildData.ts, apply-abc-os-migrations.sh'. Anti-patterns (line 357): 'Touching the migration files because "the doc references them and the doc is wrong" → A0 explicitly prohibited schema/seed edits. Adapt the doc, not the schema'.

expectations.text: Brief includes the wiki/log.md write-back entry with the reconciliation note
expectations.evidence: STEP 3 Write-back 1 (lines 215-251) specifies the full markdown block to append to `00_Amadeus/30_MEMORY_CORE/LLM_Wiki/wiki/log.md`. Block has YAML-style structure with: A0 intent, Doctrine anchors, D1 verification receipts (3 queries with expected output), Edit operations performed (4 total), D1 follow-up check, Files NOT touched list, Status. Full 30+ line block template provided.

expectations.text: [NEW-1] Brief specifies Edit operations for all 3 drift items (column name, phase id, category id) with verbatim old_string and new_string — not 'no edit needed' or paraphrased
expectations.evidence: STEP 2 Edits 1-4 each have an explicit 'Old string' / 'New string' structure (lines 131, 137, 153, 159, 173, 179, 195, 201). All 3 drift items are covered: column name (Edit 2, line 150-161), phase id (Edit 3 row 1, line 173-175), category id (Edit 3 row 2, line 175). Edit 4 (bonus, Antigravity handoff reframe) is a 4th edit that strengthens the brief without paraphrasing.

claims.claim: Drift confirmed via 3 D1 queries before any Edit
claims.evidence: STEP 1 = 3 mandatory queries with raw output capture. STOP CONDITION if drift shape doesn't match. STEP 2 = Edits only after STEP 1 passes.

claims.claim: 4 Edits with verbatim old_string/new_string on the handoff file
claims.evidence: STEP 2 Edits 1-4: each has both old_string and new_string in fenced code blocks. Edit 1: project_id reference; Edit 2: column name row; Edit 3: phase + category id rows; Edit 4: Antigravity handoff reference.

STEP 2 HARD CONSTRAINT lists 5 forbidden files. STEP 3 Files NOT touched section repeats the list. Anti-patterns (line 357) reinforces with explicit 'Touching the migration files... → A0 explicitly prohibited'.

suggestions.reason: NEW-1 assertion (verbatim old_string/new_string structure across all 3 drift items) passes on this brief — the brief provides Edit 1/2/3 with the canonical 'Old string' / 'New string' labels and Edit 4 (bonus) with Antigravity handoff reframe.

eval_feedback.overall: Brief is exceptional — comprehensive D1-then-Edit structure, verbatim strings, full D3/D1 doctrine anchoring, exhaustive forbidden-files list, full write-back block. Sets the bar for all future eval-3-style reconciliation briefs. The new 'old_string/new_string structural' assertion (NEW-1) passes cleanly on this brief.
